taxonomy: Lisianthius tatei is classified within the family Gentianaceae, commonly known as the gentian family. This family is part of the order Gentianales, which consists of flowering plants that include gentians, snapdragons, and goldenseals. The order Gentianales is further grouped under the subclass Asteridae, a clade of flowering plants that includes many families.
